creator: contextual.ai

evidence.text: of Technical Staff Production agents drift. Context that worked well last month can quietly degrade performance today. Agentic Context Engineering (ACE) was designed to solve this: an algorithm that continuously refines an agent's context based on real interactions, so performance improves over time rather than erodes. But getting ACE to work reliably in production is a different challenge than getting it to work in a lab. We deployed ACE against real enterprise workloads — agentic search tasks across engineering and finance domains — and identified two practical blockers that determine whether ACE improves your agent or regresses it: feedba

title: Making ACE Work in Production: Two Lessons from the Real World | Contextual AI
